info.name: GraphQL – Analytics Module
info.description: Analytics: performanceMetrics, aggregateMetrics; submitPerformanceMetric. Variables: use camelCase (metricName, metricValue, startDate, endDate). See sql/apis/18_ANALYTICS_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query { analytics { performanceMetrics(input: { limit: 100 }) { id metricName metricValue timestamp } } }","variables":{}}

{"query":"query Agg($input: AggregateMetricsInput!) { analytics { aggregateMetrics(input: $input) { avg min max count } } }","variables":{"input":{"metricName":"LCP","startDate":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z","endDate":"2024-01-31T23:59:59Z"}}

body: query":"mutation Submit($input: SubmitPerformanceMetricInput!) { analytics { submitPerformanceMetric(input: $input) { success message } } }","variables":{"input":{"name":"LCP","value":2.5,"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"}}
